Package glide.api.models.commands

Class SetOptions.Expiry

  • java.lang.Object
    • glide.api.models.commands.SetOptions.Expiry
  • Enclosing class:
    SetOptions
    public static final class SetOptions.Expiry
extends java.lang.Object
    Configuration of value lifetime.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static SetOptions.Expiry KeepExisting()
      Retain the time to live associated with the key.
      static SetOptions.Expiry Milliseconds​(java.lang.Long milliseconds)
      Set the specified expire time, in milliseconds.
      static SetOptions.Expiry Seconds​(java.lang.Long seconds)
      Set the specified expire time, in seconds.
      static SetOptions.Expiry UnixMilliseconds​(java.lang.Long unixMilliseconds)
      Set the specified Unix time at which the key will expire, in milliseconds.
      static SetOptions.Expiry UnixSeconds​(java.lang.Long unixSeconds)
      Set the specified Unix time at which the key will expire, in seconds.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • KeepExisting

        public static SetOptions.Expiry KeepExisting()
        Retain the time to live associated with the key. Equivalent to KEEPTTL in the Valkey API.

      • Seconds

        public static SetOptions.Expiry Seconds​(java.lang.Long seconds)
        Set the specified expire time, in seconds. Equivalent to EX in the Valkey API.
        Parameters:
        seconds - time to expire, in seconds
        Returns:
        Expiry

      • Milliseconds

        public static SetOptions.Expiry Milliseconds​(java.lang.Long milliseconds)
        Set the specified expire time, in milliseconds. Equivalent to PX in the Valkey API.
        Parameters:
        milliseconds - time to expire, in milliseconds
        Returns:
        Expiry

      • UnixSeconds

        public static SetOptions.Expiry UnixSeconds​(java.lang.Long unixSeconds)
        Set the specified Unix time at which the key will expire, in seconds. Equivalent to EXAT in the Valkey API.
        Parameters:
        unixSeconds - UNIX TIME to expire, in seconds.
        Returns:
        Expiry

      • UnixMilliseconds

        public static SetOptions.Expiry UnixMilliseconds​(java.lang.Long unixMilliseconds)
        Set the specified Unix time at which the key will expire, in milliseconds. Equivalent to PXAT in the Valkey API.
        Parameters:
        unixMilliseconds - UNIX TIME to expire, in milliseconds.
        Returns:
        Expiry
